channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Alberta separatist petition reaches 300,000 signatures amid national political concerns
item.description: As of May 4, 2026, leaders of Alberta's separatist movement reported collecting 301,450 signatures for a petition asking residents whether the province should remain part of Canada or pursue independe...

item.title: Puducherry Chief Minister N Rangasamy Secures Victory in Thattanchavady Constituency
item.description: In the recently concluded Puducherry Assembly elections, Chief Minister N Rangasamy of the All India NR Congress has emerged victorious from the Thattanchavady constituency, defeating E Vinayagam of t...

item.title: Asian economies struggle with energy shortages amid Iran war
item.description: Asian countries, especially emerging markets, are feeling the rising impact of the energy crisis triggered by the ongoing Iran war. Governments across Asia, which imports most of its oil from the Midd...

item.title: Asake Makes History With Fifth UK Number One Album
item.description: Asake don make serious history as him latest album 'M$NEY' don reach number one for UK Apple Music chart, na him fifth album to do am. With this achievement, Asake become first African artiste wey don...

item.title: Sebola believes PSL title race still competitive despite Sundowns lead
item.description: Retired Orlando Pirates striker Andries Sebola has expressed optimism that the Premier Soccer League (PSL) title race is still very much alive, despite Mamelodi Sundowns holding a five-point advantage...

item.title: Eccentric Exercises Can Improve Fitness Efficiently with Less Effort
item.description: Sports scientist Ken Nosaka from Edith Cowan University in Australia highlights the benefits of eccentric exercise, a training method that focuses on the lengthening phase of muscle movement, such as ...

item.title: US Launches ‘Project Freedom’ to Escort Ships Through Strait of Hormuz Amid Iran Tensions
item.description: The United States has initiated a major military operation named “Project Freedom” to assist commercial vessels stranded in the Strait of Hormuz, following heightened tensions linked to the ongoing US...

item.title: Trinamool Congress Loses Ground in Kolkata During West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026
item.description: In the 2026 West Bengal assembly elections, the Trinamool Congress (TMC) faced a major setback in Kolkata, once considered its fortress. In a dramatic reversal from 2021, when TMC had swept all 11 Kol...

item.title: Medical evacuations underway after hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship claims three lives
item.description: A hantavirus outbreak aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship has resulted in three fatalities and several passengers falling seriously ill. Among those affected are 23 British and 17 American passengers, i...

item.title: US and Iran clash in Gulf over control of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: On May 4, 2026, the US and Iran escalated military confrontations in the Gulf, particularly around the strategic Strait of Hormuz. The situation intensified as both countries launched missiles and dro...

item.title: Health authorities clarify low risk of hantavirus for the public
item.description: The national Department of Health and medical experts have urged South Africans not to panic about hantavirus following the deaths of two cruise ship passengers, a husband and wife, who reportedly con...

item.title: Wu Yize claims thrilling World Snooker Championship title after deciding frame
item.description: In a historic and gripping finale at the 50th World Snooker Championship in Sheffield, 22-year-old Wu Yize triumphed over 43-year-old Shaun Murphy, winning 18-17 in the first deciding frame in almost ...

item.title: Anas Galadima Declares for APC Ticket in Baruten–Kaiama Federal Constituency
item.description: Media, telecom, and public policy professional Anas Adamu Galadima, wey people sabi as Zam-Zam, don officially enter the race for House of Representatives seat under All Progressives Congress (APC) fo...

item.title: FIA confirms Formula One may switch back to V8 engines by 2030
item.description: Formula One is set to move away from the current V6 hybrid engines and return to simpler, louder V8 power units by either 2030 or 2031, according to FIA president Mohammed Ben Sulayem. Speaking at the...

item.title: Ottawa selects LeBreton Flats for National Monument honouring Afghanistan mission
item.description: The Canadian federal government has announced the location for the National Monument to Canada’s Mission in Afghanistan, set on LeBreton Flats in Ottawa. The monument will honour over 40,000 Canadians...

item.title: Fireworks plant explosion in China results in at least 21 fatalities and dozens injured
item.description: An explosion occurred at a fireworks manufacturing facility in Liuyang, a city in the Hunan province of central China, resulting in at least 21 deaths and 61 injuries, according to state media reports...

item.title: Renowned KP cleric Muhammad Idrees killed in targeted attack in Charsadda
item.description: In a tragic incident on Tuesday, Maulana Muhammad Idrees, a respected cleric from Charsadda's Tarangzai area, was shot dead by unidentified gunmen. Police stated that Idrees was travelling to Darul Ul...

item.title: Comedian Oga Obinna Shares Heartwarming Moments with Mother in Maseno
item.description: Comedian and TV host Oga Obinna treated his fans to a rare and heartwarming glimpse of his mother during a visit to their rural home in Maseno. The video, shared on his social media pages on May 4, 20...

item.title: Fire Breaks Out Again at 11 Thorncliffe Park Drive in Toronto, Same Area as 2025 Blaze
item.description: A fire erupted on May 4, 2026, at an apartment high-rise located at 11 Thorncliffe Park Drive in Toronto, in the same section of the building that experienced a weeks-long fire in late 2025. This time...

item.title: Delhi Weather Forecast for DC vs CSK IPL 2026 Match on May 5
item.description: On May 5, 2026, Delhi Capitals (DC) will face Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in the 48th match of IPL 2026 at Arun Jaitley Stadium, Delhi. DC currently sits in seventh place with four wins and five losses,...
